creator: hasanalpinan@gmail.com
text:
Hi Colin

I did exactly what you say and it worked. First ; I installed *p5-Switch* (*
/usr/ports/lang/p5-Switch/*) port. After; started perl reinstall process
with this command : *portupgrade -fr perl* (Source: */usr/ports/UPDATING*file)

All process completed successfully. Thanks for support.

Best Regards

Hasan Alp iNAN
